message:
fix: Resolve OUTPUT_DIR relative path bug and release notes formatting

giil:
- Convert OUTPUT_DIR to absolute path before changing to GIIL_HOME
- Previously, running `giil "url"` from /home/user/photos would save
  files to ~/.cache/giil/ instead of the current directory because:
  1. OUTPUT_DIR defaults to "." (relative path)
  2. Script does `cd "$GIIL_HOME"` before running node
  3. Node interprets "." as current dir (now ~/.cache/giil/)
- Fix: Use `cd "$OUTPUT_DIR" && pwd` to resolve to absolute path

release.yml:
- Fix heredoc indentation issue in release notes generation
- YAML block indentation was being included in the heredoc content
- Added sed command to strip leading whitespace from generated markdown
- Prevents markdown rendering issues (4+ spaces = code block)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate release notes
         id: notes
         run: |
-          cat << 'EOF' > release_notes.md
+          cat > release_notes.md << 'EOF'
           ## Installation
 
           ```bash
@@ -68,8 +68,9 @@ jobs:
           ## Checksums
 
           SHA256 checksums for this release are attached as `checksums.sha256`.
-
           EOF
+          # Remove leading whitespace from each line (YAML indentation artifact)
+          sed -i 's/^          //' release_notes.md
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1

@@ -1320,6 +1320,9 @@ parse_args() {
         mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"
     fi
 
+    # Convert OUTPUT_DIR to absolute path (critical: we cd to GIIL_HOME before running node)
+    OUTPUT_DIR=$(cd "$OUTPUT_DIR" && pwd)
+
     # Normalize URL - support both formats
     # share.icloud.com/photos/XXX -> www.icloud.com/photos/#XXX
     if [[ "$URL" =~ share\.icloud\.com/photos/([A-Za-z0-9_+/=-]+) ]]; then
